layers: all pixels not covered by any other defined layer
the horizontal band of red and orange stripes across the upper portion of the image
the horizontal band of blue and darker colored stripes below the red stripes
the horizontal band of lighter blue and white tones suggesting water or a distant horizon line
the pale, round shape representing the head of the central figure
the visible skin area of the central figure's face, including the forehead and cheeks
the dark, indistinct mass surrounding the head of the central figure
the dark, draped shape representing the torso and clothing of the central figure
the vertical, dark, pillar-like structures visible on the left side of the composition
the diagonal, striped area sloping down and to the left from the central figure
the diagonal, striped area sloping down and to the right from the central figure
